text: Now let me find which PRs close Linear issues that aren't in 'done' state

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs-with-non-done-linear
  (filter (fn [pr]
            (let [linear-id (:closes_linear pr)
                  linear-state (get linear-id-to-state linear-id)]
              (and linear-state (not= linear-state "done"))))
          prs-with-linear))
(count prs-with-non-done-linear)"}
